title: UR URLIFEHALL 30 Pcs 3 Colours Valentine's Day Silicone Beads Heart Shaped Silicone Focal Beads for DIY Jewellery Making Craft Gift Decor
features: Size: These heart silicone beads are about 19x20x11.5mm, hole is 2mm, total is 30pcs love heart beads, 3 colours, 10pcs/colour. Please refer to the legend for detail size and colour about these heart focal beads.

Silicone Material: Our heart shaped beads are made of silicone material, all silicone focal beads are soft and sturdy, lightweight, not easy to break or deform, these love heart sweet beads can be applied for a long time.

Love Heart Beads: These silicone beads are featured with sweet heart shape, looks cute and attractive, will be your nice decoration and attract people's attention easily, also improve your whole temperament.

DIY Together: It's time to match and create different jewellery craft projects as you like, just share the fun with friends, family or any close people in your life who also enjoys handmade craft work, getting some quality DIY time together.

Wide Applications: These beads can be used as spacer beads with larger beads or charms to create delicate earrings, chokers, necklaces, bracelets, anklets, brooches, pendants and other DIY crafts. You can also use them to DIY a unique gift, it is ideal gift for your friends, family and for yourself.
